title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Agility India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Agility India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Agility India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Agility India:
Agility India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Agility India!
